title: Citrusy Herring Stew
description: This creamy and citrusy herring stew is perfect for a cozy dinner, featuring nut-free-friendly ingredients that add a touch of sophistication to your meals.

ingredients.name: Herring fillets
ingredients.notes: Use canned herring for convenience and flavor.

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.amount: 1 cup (whole milk or half-and-half for creaminess)

ingredients.name: Lemon zest and juice
ingredients.amount: Juice of 1 lemon, zest from half a lemon (optional)

instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, combine herring fillets with onion, garlic, celery, potato cubes, butternut squash cubes, milk, and cream. Season with salt and pepper.
Cover the pot and cook over medium heat until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes. Remove lid, increase heat to high, and bring mixture to a boil.
Stir in orange segments, add lemon zest if using, and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until mixture thickens slightly.
If topping with cheese, sprinkle shredded cheddar over stew before serving.
